[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011110 5
1 1100011 4
2 0001111 4
3 1010001 3
4 1100011 4
5 1110111 6
6 1011110 5
7 1100011 4

23 32 1100011 4 match 1 4 7

70 07 0011001 3
